title: NTA National Teachers Eligibility Test NTET Result 2026
short_information: National Testing Agency NTA has released the Information Brochure for National Teachers Eligibility Test NTET 2026 Those Candidates are Interested to the NTET in National Teachers Eligibility Test (NTET) for Indian System of Medicine & Homoeopathy Exam Can Download Result.candidates should read the NSSNET 2026 information brochure for all the information related to the exam like syllabus, eligibility, age limit, fees, Course and List, information and other types of information and then apply. National Testing Agency (NTA) NTA National Teachers Eligibility Test (NTET) for Indian System of Medicine & Homoeopathy NTA NTET 2026 Exam : Short Details of Notification
application_fee: General : 4000/- OBC NCL / EWS : 3500/- SC / ST / PH : 3000/- Pay the Examination Fee Through Debit Card, Credit Card, Net Banking, E Challan, E Wallet, Cash Card Fee Mode Only. NTA NTET 2026 : Examination Details Exam Name NTA NTET
eligibility: Read the Notification. NTA NTET 2026 for Ayush Teachers Exam District Details Uttar Pradesh: Agra, Lucknow, Varanasi & Gorakhpur Bihar: Bhagalpur & Patna Madhya Pradesh: Bhopal, Gwalior & Jabalpur New Delhi: Delhi for Other State / District Exam District Details Must Read the Information Brochure.
